B) (ii) — cork cambium
C) (iii) — secondary cortex
D) (iv) — epidermis
Paragraph - 6.4.3
Secondary Growth in Roots
122. In sunflower root. Vascular cambium is
originated from tissues —
(Pg. 97, E)
A) Below phloem bundle
B) Of pericycle
C) Of interfascicular cambium
D) Both (A) & (B)
123. Secondary growth does not occur in —
